payload.reason: Victor updated Builder Console task status with grounded evidence and governance approval.

request.query: What is the next grounded reflection for the active governed automation task "Build backend prompt-construction pipeline" in phase "Comms Tab Prompt Automation"?

groundedContext.query: What is the next grounded reflection for the active governed automation task "Build backend prompt-construction pipeline" in phase "Comms Tab Prompt Automation"?
semanticNodeLabels: Automate prompt-building inside the comms tab so the user experience collapses to standard chat input/output plus a compact operations display showing prompt construction in real time.
The resulting architecture is ready for Victor-mediated automation under Builder Console governance.
Prompt-building controls are removed from the main visible surface.
Reduce comms tab to standard chat I/O

before.title: Build backend prompt-construction pipeline
before.description: Implement the backend path that assembles prompt inputs, applies governed construction steps, and emits structured prompt-construction events for the comms tab operations display.
acceptance: Prompt inputs are assembled by a backend pipeline instead of manual UI composition.
The pipeline emits structured prompt-construction events or provenance records.
The backend path is ready to feed a compact operations display without coupling to the main chat surface.
The design remains compatible with Victor-mediated governed automation.

after.title: Build backend prompt-construction pipeline
